Alko Oy Keskusvarasto.reason: Large institutional buyer (€18.5K overdue since Oct 2025) requires strict net-45 terms with escalation protocol for major accounts.

Kesko Oyj Päivittäistavarakauppa.reason: Retail chain with scale; recent overdue (#5750, 13 days) signals need for tighter net-30 enforcement.

My Dear Beer B.V..reason: Export customer (€9.6K, 59 days overdue) needs structured payment plan; export DSO typically 50–60 days but this breach requires renegotiation.

OlutSatama (Ideaosuuskunta Aito).reason: Cooperative buyer; 289 days overdue suggests relationship dispute or insolvency; recommend immediate collection review.

Salama Shop.reason: Own channel; enforce 3–5 day settlement to protect internal liquidity (currently 74 days overdue = operational red flag).

alerts.message: Escalate €18,484 invoice #4460 (168 days overdue) to credit committee; contact account manager for payment plan or suspend further shipments.
Invoice #3837 (€5,882) is 286 days overdue; initiate formal collection or write-off review immediately.
Invoice #14 (€4,540) is 610 days overdue; confirm if customer is active or pursue legal recovery.
Internal invoice #5350 (€1,301) is 74 days overdue; audit internal settlement process and enforce net-5 policy.
€9,558 invoice #5151 is 59 days overdue; contact customer for immediate payment commitment or suspend orders.
Total overdue AR is €72,268 (36% of open AR); this exceeds 1 month of fixed costs (€62,781). Prioritize collections on Alko, OlutSatama, and Wet Goods accounts.
44 open POs totaling €79,996 create supply-side cash drag; reconcile inventory turnover against 50 orders/€45.9K in last 30 days (DSO mismatch risk).
Bemböle contract (€25K/mo) ends September 2026; model revenue cliff and prepare diversification or new contract before Q3 2026.

insights.weekly_cash_risk: €72K overdue AR plus €80K committed PO spend against €201K monthly budget creates 6–8 week export DSO lag; cash coverage is tight if Alko and Kesko do not remit by week of 2026-04-20.
insights.top_action: Call Alko Oy account manager today (2026-04-16) to secure payment commitment for €18,484 (#4460) within 7 days or place account on COD; simultaneously audit Salama Shop internal process to unlock €1,301 cash same-day.
pattern_insights: Export customers (My Dear Beer B.V., Wittich Weine, Made in Poland, Gig Linden) are 0–59 days overdue; suggests DSO creep from 50–60 to 70+ days due to 62% growth outpacing collections.
Institutional buyers (Alko, Kesko, OlutSatama) show 13–289 days overdue; indicates weak enforcement of net-45 terms on high-value accounts and possible relationship/credit issues with older accounts.
insights.wc_note: Working capital is critically stretched: €128K open AR + €80K committed PO spend (6-8 week lag on export) against €62.8K/mo fixed costs leaves minimal buffer; 62% YoY growth is not translating to cash, signaling need for supply-chain financing or tighter customer credit policy.
